titleStmt.title: SII 30.9: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 9. (A.R. No. 87 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District. Muruganātha temple-on the south wall of the central shrine Vikrama-Chōḻa: year 14: 1287 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of flower-garden (nandāvaṉam) to the temple of Āḷuḍaiyār Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi Nāyaṉār by Śōḻasiṅgadēvaṉ. The name of the nandāvaṉam was Ārādakūttaṉ and it was established by the above mentioned individual. Two persons Vaḷattāvaḻi, the son-in-law of the donor and another person Namaśivāyadēvaṉ undertook the responsibility of tending the garden. Reference is made to the temple of Śōḻīśvaramuḍaiya Nāyaṉār, and river Naḷḷāṟu while describing the boundaries.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḻa
tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu Āḷu
ṭaiyār tirumurukanpūṇṭi nā
yanāṟku perumāḷ mutalikaḷil
coḻaciṅka tevaneṉ ceyvit
ta Ārātakūttan tirunantāvaṉat
tukku Ellaiyāvatu naḷḷāṟṟu muri
ppukku meṟkum coḻiśvaramuṭaiya nā
yanār koyilukku vaṭaṟkumRead- vaṭakkumvayalukku ki
ḻakkum naḷḷāṟṟukkut teṟkum Ive
llaikkuṭpaṭa nantāvanam Eṉ marumakan vaḷat
tāvaḻiyum Āḷuṭaiyār tirumurukaṉpūṇṭi
nāyinār tirumaṭaviḷākattilirukkum tiruve
kampaṭiyāril palviḷakan marumakaṉ namacivā
ya tevanum Ivviraṇṭu vaḻiyiluḷḷārum
teṅku kamuku Iluppaiyum viruccākkit teva
kanmikaḷ Ivai talaikaṇṭa mutal koṇṭu ti
ruaviṭṭa mutalukku makaḷ makaḷ makaḷ kuṭi
nīṅ(k)kā nantāvanam ceytu varuvārkaḷā
na Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 30.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
